Specially Appearing Defendant Amirhossein Hatamzads Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Plaintiffs Summons And First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of J. Kyle Gaines In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-04-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. J. KYLE GAINES, Esq. of Bassi, Edlin, Huie & Blum LLP (Tel: 213-412-2661) for Specially Appearing Defendant Amirhossein Hatamzad;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT AMIRHOSSEIN HATAMZAD's Motion To Quash Service Of Plaintiffs Summons And First Amended Complaint.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Specially appearing defendant Amirhossein Hatamzad's unopposed "motion to quash service of plaintiff's summons and first amended complaint" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
